name: Gooise Meren (Netherlands)
description: A white field bearing the 'gm' municipal logo and the name 'gemeente gooise meren'.
history: Flag of the municipality of Gooise Meren in the province of North Holland, formed in 2016. The flag is the municipality's logo/wordmark banner rather than a heraldic design.

features.role: the 'gm' logo and wordmark 'gemeente gooise meren'
